visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long, flowing dark hair and red lipstick is centered in a medium close-up shot, speaking directly into the camera lens in a selfie-style recording. She is wearing a low-cut dress with a brown and white abstract pattern, and a pair of black sunglasses is perched on her head. The setting is an outdoor street or park area with lush green trees in the background. Several parked motorcycles are visible on a paved sidewalk to the right, and the lighting is bright natural daylight. (2) The camera remains in a steady handheld position as the woman continues to speak, her facial expressions and lip movements synchronized with her monologue. The background environment remains consistent, showcasing a urban greenery scene with a road in the far distance. White text subtitles with black outlines appear at the bottom of the frame periodically. Her posture is relaxed, and she occasionally tilts her head slightly as she communicates with the viewer.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我發現台灣. [Slogan]: (我真的想不通). (2) [Subtitle]: 有一個很奇怪的現象. (3) [Subtitle]: 就是路上的胖子. (4) [Subtitle]: 真的好少喔. (5) [Subtitle]: 明明那麼多美食. [Slogan]: (我一直吃一直吃). (6) [Subtitle]: 為什麼胖子可以那麼少. [Slogan]: (我才來第二天就胖1kg了). (7) [Subtitle]: 什麼秘訣?. (8) [Subtitle]: 可以告訴我嗎?. [Slogan]: (求你們了).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator in the foreground.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a patterned floral-print low-cut dress and sunglasses on her head.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A tree-lined sidewalk with numerous parked scooters and motorcycles; a park-like setting with green foliage and a distant road.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking in a pleasant, conversational tone with a moderate pitch. Her Mandarin delivery is clear and friendly as she introduces an observation. In the background, a light and melodic acoustic piano track plays at a soft volume, complemented by a very subtle urban ambient noise floor featuring distant traffic hum. (2) The speaker continues her monologue, her tone shifting slightly to one of curiosity and pleading towards the end. The background music remains steady, maintaining a cheerful and lighthearted mood throughout. No sudden sound effects or sharp transients occur, leaving the focus entirely on the vocal narration and the gentle musical accompaniment.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a personal vlog-style observation where the creator expresses surprise at how people in Taiwan remain slim despite the abundance of delicious food. She humorously points out her own weight gain and asks the audience for 'secrets' to staying fit.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media short-form video focusing on personal interaction and cultural observation. The high density of subtitles and humorous slogans suggests it is designed for engagement on platforms like Instagram or TikTok.
